message:
fix(mux): switch H264 decoder to avc3 + raw Annex B passthrough

Use avc3 codec with in-band SPS/PPS (Annex B format) instead of avc1
with out-of-band description. This eliminates the need for Annex B to
AVCC format conversion — server sends Annex B natively, client passes
it straight through to VideoDecoder. Simpler, less overhead.
